# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "appName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure Function App. This will also be used to derive the App Service Plan name."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The Azure region where the Function App resources will be deployed."
      }
    },
    "functionRuntime": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "dotnet",
      "allowedValues": [
        "dotnet",
        "node",
        "python",
        "java",
        "powershell",
        "custom"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The runtime stack for the Function App (e.g., dotnet, node, python)."
      }
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of an existing Azure Storage Account to use for the Function App's own runtime operations (blobs, files, queues). This account will be accessed via connection string."
      }
    },
    "functionAppPlanSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Y1",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU name for the App Service Plan (e.g., Y1 for Consumption, S1 for Standard, EP1 for Premium)."
      }
    },
    "functionAppPlanSkuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Dynamic",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU tier for the App Service Plan (e.g., Dynamic for Consumption, Standard, Premium)."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "appServicePlanName": "[format('{0}-plan', parameters('appName'))]",
    "functionAppName": "[parameters('appName')]",
    "appServicePlanId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2022-03-01",
      "name": "[variables('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('functionAppPlanSkuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('functionAppPlanSkuTier')]",
        "size": "0",
        "family": "Y",
        "capacity": 0
      },
      "properties": {
        "reserved": true,
        "isSpot": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2022-03-01",
      "name": "[variables('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "functionapp",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[variables('appServicePlanId')]",
        "siteConfig": {
          "appSettings": [
            { "name": "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME", "value": "[parameters('functionRuntime')]" },
            { "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage", "value": "[format('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName={0};EndpointSuffix={1};', parameters('storageAccountName'), environment().suffixes.storage)]" },
            { "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING", "value": "[format('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName={0};EndpointSuffix={1};', parameters('storageAccountName'), environment().suffixes.storage)]" },
            { "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTSHARE", "value": "[toLower(variables('functionAppName'))]" },
            { "name": "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION", "value": "~4" },
            { "name": "APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY", "value": "" }
          ]
        },
        "httpsOnly": true
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
      ]
    },

    // --- Role Assignments for the Function App's System-Assigned Managed Identity ---
    // These assignments grant broad permissions to access *any* resource of the specified type
    // within the resource group where this template is deployed.
    // This provides the 'wildcard for flexibility' requested.
    // For production environments, consider narrowing the scope and roles to adhere to the principle of least privilege.

    // 1. Azure Storage Account Data Access (Blobs and Queues)
    // Allows the Function App to read/write blob and queue data in any storage account within this resource group.
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'StorageBlobDataContributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceGroup().id]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'StorageQueueDataContributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceGroup().id]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '974c5e8b-4522-4cf7-ad87-b261ba29f2e9')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName'))]"
      ]
    },

    // 2. Azure Key Vault Access
    // Grants broad administrative access to any Key Vault within this resource group.
    // This allows the Function App to manage Key Vaults and access secrets/keys/certificates.
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'KeyVaultAdministrator')]",
      "scope": "[resourceGroup().id]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '00482a5a-887f-4fb3-b363-3b7fe8e74676')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName'))]"
      ]
    },

    // 3. Azure SQL Database Access (Management Plane)
    // Grants the Function App 'Contributor' role at the resource group level.
    // This allows management operations on SQL Servers and Databases within the RG (e.g., creating/deleting databases, configuring firewalls),
    // but typically *not* direct data access within the SQL database itself. For data access, configure AAD authentication
    // on the SQL server and grant SQL roles to the Managed Identity within the database (e.g., `CREATE USER [Managed Identity Name] FROM EXTERNAL PROVIDER; ALTER ROLE db_datareader ADD MEMBER [Managed Identity Name];`).
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'SqlContributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceGroup().id]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName'))]"
      ]
    },

    // 4. Azure Cosmos DB Data Access
    // Grants the Function App 'Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor' role.
    // This allows read/write access to data in any Cosmos DB account within this resource group.
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'CosmosDBBuiltInDataContributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceGroup().id]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '42318057-6799-4d6d-ad02-04e3b7b6529f')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('functionAppName')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the deployed Azure Function App."
      }
    },
    "functionAppPrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2022-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The Principal ID of the Function App's System-Assigned Managed Identity. Use this for further IAM configurations if needed."
      }
    }
  }
}
